message:
fix(roam): propagate retry-after header for 5xx API errors

The Roam client parsed the retry-after header from HTTP responses but
only stored it for 429 (RateLimited) errors. For 5xx errors that also
include retry-after (e.g. 503 Service Unavailable), the header value
was silently discarded. This caused self_check to report null instead
of the actual retry_after_ms in live probe details.

Add retry_after_ms: Option<u64> to the Api error variant so the parsed
header survives through retry_after() and to_fcp_error() for all status
codes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
